title: fix(authorize): keep mismatched deny redirects local
author: voodoohop

gist.headline: Keeping it local
gist.blurb: We've tightened up the authorization flow. If an app-key redirect validation fails, deny redirects now stay safely local.
gist.summary: Fixed an issue in the authorization flow to ensure deny redirects remain local when app-key redirect validation fails, and updated the API documentation to clarify redirect URI matching rules.
gist.impact: Developers integrating with the API will experience more predictable and secure redirect behavior during authorization failures.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee acting as a friendly traffic controller or security guard, keeping misrouted data packets (redirects) safely within a local garden area.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polly the bee wearing a tiny security guard hat, standing at a glowing lime green (#ecf874) toll booth. She is holding up a small stop sign to a misrouted digital envelope, keeping it safely inside a cozy fenced garden. Soft pastel gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Cozy pixel art, 8-bit aesthetic, soft pastel gradients, warm lighting, retro gaming vibes. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
